assertions.assertion: Output identifies the missing .Sha256() call on the client secret and fixes it
Output identifies the trailing slash on the redirect URI as a potential mismatch issue and removes it
assertions.rationale: Did not identify the trailing slash issue - the fixed client still has the trailing slash

assertions.assertion: Output identifies the missing 'openid' scope and adds it to AllowedScopes
Output changes AllowOfflineAccess to true to enable refresh token issuance
Output warns about hardcoding secrets in source code or recommends loading from configuration/vault
assertions.rationale: No warning about hardcoded secrets - still uses 'super-secret-password'.Sha256()
